summary: Tested D'CLIC PRO Questionnaire Integration - All backend APIs working (22/22 tests passed). Frontend questionnaire, results page, and import modal all functional after fixing missing CheckCircle2 import.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing CheckCircle2 import from lucide-react causing runtime error when D'CLIC PRO profile preview is displayed

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added CheckCircle2 to lucide-react imports in Dashboard.jsx (line 31)
All 17 questions have correct structure with id, question, category, type, choices
Visual questions have valid image URLs from pexels.com
Ranking questions have 4+ choices with instruction text
Access code format XXXX-XXXX correctly generated and validated
Profile computation correctly calculates MBTI, DISC, RIASEC, Vertus from answers
seed_data_creation: TEST_dclic_* users created for testing, D'CLIC results stored in dclic_results collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: D'CLIC PRO questionnaire feature fully tested. Backend routes at /api/dclic/* all working. Frontend DclicTestPage.jsx handles 17 questions (visual + ranking types). Dashboard import modal retrieves profile by access code. Fixed missing CheckCircle2 import in Dashboard.jsx.

backend_apis: GET /api/dclic/questionnaire - Returns 17 questions with correct structure (PASSED)
POST /api/dclic/submit - Returns access_code (XXXX-XXXX) and profile with MBTI/DISC/RIASEC/Vertus (PASSED)
POST /api/dclic/retrieve - Returns profile for valid code, 404 for invalid, 400 for malformed (PASSED)
POST /api/dclic/claim - Marks code as claimed, returns 400 for already claimed (PASSED)
frontend_flows: /test-dclic page loads with first question and images (PASSED)
Questionnaire navigation - select answer -> click Suivant -> next question (PASSED)
Ranking questions allow selecting 4 choices in order with rank numbers displayed (PASSED)
After completing 17 questions, results page shows access code and profile summary (PASSED)
Dashboard 'Charger mon profil D'CLIC PRO' button opens modal with code input (PASSED)
Entering valid code shows profile preview with MBTI/DISC/Vertu/RIASEC (PASSED)
Dashboard 'Passer le test D'CLIC PRO' banner navigates to /test-dclic (PASSED)
profile_computation: MBTI computation from E/I, S/N, T/F, J/P answers (PASSED)
DISC ranking computation with weighted scores (PASSED)
Vertus computation with forces, qualites, savoirs_etre (PASSED)

bug_fixed.root_cause: CheckCircle2 icon was used in D'CLIC preview section but not imported
